code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut in_tok = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if is_space
      if in_tok
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        let sq = v * v
        if first
          result = "#{sq}"
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{sq}"
        end
        in_tok = false
      end
    else
      if not in_tok
        start = i
        in_tok = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_tok
    let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
    let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let sq = v * v
    if first
      result = "#{sq}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{sq}"
    end
  end
  println(result)
end
